summary: Tested all 5 requested features for Evolution PRO OS. All features working correctly: Admin 'Clienti Analisi Strategica' panel loads data, modal shows client details, 'Segna analisi come completata' button works for paid clients, Partner Dashboard shows F0-F10 phases, and Dashboard Cliente State 4 shows 'La tua Analisi è pronta' with 'Prenota call' button.
passed_tests: ✅ Admin Panel 'Clienti Analisi Strategica' - Loads 21 clients correctly with stats (Totale, Questionario, Pagato, Analisi pronta)
✅ Admin Panel - 'Dettagli' button opens modal with all client info (Email, Telefono, Registrazione, Stato, PROCESSO steps, RISPOSTE QUESTIONARIO)
✅ Admin Panel - 'Segna analisi come completata' button appears for paid clients (pagamento_analisi=true, analisi_generata=false)
✅ Admin Panel - 'Segna analisi come completata' button works - updates client status to 'Analisi Pronta' and increments stats
✅ Partner Dashboard - Loads at /dashboard-partner for authenticated partners
✅ Partner Dashboard - Shows partner profile with initials, name, phase (F0-F10), progress bar
✅ Partner Dashboard - Shows 'Il tuo percorso' with 8 journey steps and completion status
✅ Partner Dashboard - Shows upcoming events with WhatsApp reminder button
✅ Partner Dashboard - Shows current task CTA ('Completa la Registrazione', 'Inizia ora')
✅ Dashboard Cliente State 4 - Shows 'La tua Analisi Strategica è pronta' when analisi_generata=true
✅ Dashboard Cliente State 4 - Shows 'Analisi completata!' badge
✅ Dashboard Cliente State 4 - Shows 4-step progress bar with all steps completed
✅ Dashboard Cliente State 4 - Shows 'Prenota la tua call strategica' button
seed_data_creation: Updated test user att2_1773352332@test.com with pagamento_analisi=true and analisi_generata=true for testing. Updated partner testf0@evolutionpro.it password for testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: 1) Admin Clienti Analisi panel at sidebar 'Clienti Analisi' shows all cliente_analisi users with stats and filtering. 2) Dettagli modal shows full client info including questionario responses. 3) 'Segna analisi come completata' button appears only for paid clients and updates analisi_generata=true. 4) Partner Dashboard at /dashboard-partner shows F0-F10 phases with journey steps. 5) Dashboard Cliente State 4 shows 'La tua Analisi è pronta' with 'Prenota call' button when analisi_generata=true.

verified_features.admin_clienti_analisi_panel: WORKING - Shows all cliente_analisi users with stats (Totale, Questionario, Pagato, Analisi pronta)
verified_features.admin_dettagli_modal: WORKING - Opens modal with Email, Telefono, Registrazione, Stato, PROCESSO steps, RISPOSTE QUESTIONARIO
verified_features.admin_segna_analisi_button: WORKING - Appears for paid clients, updates analisi_generata=true via POST /api/admin/clienti-analisi/{user_id}/genera-analisi
verified_features.partner_dashboard: WORKING - Shows at /dashboard-partner with F0-F10 phases, journey steps, events, current task CTA
verified_features.dashboard_cliente_state4: WORKING - Shows 'La tua Analisi Strategica è pronta' with 'Prenota la tua call strategica' button when analisi_generata=true
